title: Surgeon Vacancy at Piramal Pharma Global Group - 2026 Batch

jsonLd.title: Surgeon Vacancy at Piramal Pharma Global Group - 2026 Batch
jsonLd.description:
Piramal Pharma Global Group has an exciting opening for a Surgeon at our Thane office. Join a company that values innovation, collaboration, and continuous learning.

About Piramal Pharma Global Group:
Piramal Pharma Global Group is a leading organization in the Remote sector, committed to excellence, innovation, and employee growth. We offer a dynamic work environment where talent is recognized and rewarded.

Key Responsibilities:
• Administer medications and treatments as prescribed
• Participate in quality improvement initiatives and clinical audits
• Collaborate with pharmaceutical representatives and medical suppliers
• Coordinate with multidisciplinary teams for comprehensive patient management
• Maintain sterile environments and follow infection control protocols
• Monitor patient progress and adjust treatment plans accordingly
• Adhere to NABH/JCI accreditation standards

Required Skills & Qualifications:
• Diploma or Degree in Hospitality Management
• 0-1 years of relevant experience
• Proficiency in Medical Terminology
• Proficiency in NABH Standards
• Proficiency in Telemedicine
• Proficiency in Diagnostic Skills
• Proficiency in Patient Care
• Proficiency in HIPAA Compliance
• Proficiency in Medical Ethics
• Proficiency in Health Informatics

Work Mode: Remote - Work from anywhere in India

What We Offer:
• Work-from-home flexibility
• Annual paid leaves and casual leaves
• Modern office with recreational facilities
• Employee stock options (ESOPs) for eligible roles
• Company-sponsored certifications
• Competitive salary with performance-linked incentives
• Salary Range: 2.5 LPA - 6 LPA per annum

Location: Thane, Maharashtra, India

If you are excited about this opportunity, apply now and take the next step in your career journey with Piramal Pharma Global Group!

educationRequirements.credentialCategory: Diploma or Degree in Hospitality Management
